description: Scatter plot with linear regression for capacity planning — compare host metrics against service throughput across configurable time-window samples.

configuration.name: targetThroughput
configuration.title: Target Throughput(s)
configuration.description: Comma-separated list of throughput targets to predict the metric at (e.g. '1000,2000,5000'). Each is shown as a vertical line on the chart and a column in the projection table.

configuration.name: xAxisMultiplier
configuration.title: X-Axis Multiplier
configuration.description: Extends the scatter plot X-axis to (max observed throughput × multiplier) for trend extrapolation. Default: 1.

configuration.name: multipliers
configuration.title: Projection Multipliers
configuration.description: Comma-separated list of throughput multipliers to show as columns in the projection table (e.g. '1,2,4,10,20'). Default: 1,2,4,10.

configuration.name: tpsPercentile
configuration.title: TPS Percentile
configuration.description: Percentile (1–100) of observed throughput used as the baseline for projection column headers and multiplier calculations. Default: 95 (P95). Use 50 for median or 100 for max.

configuration.name: xAxisLabel
configuration.title: X-Axis Label
configuration.description: Label shown on the scatter plot X-axis. Default: 'Throughput'.

configuration.name: yAxisLabel
configuration.title: Y-Axis Label
configuration.description: Label shown on the scatter plot Y-axis. Default: 'Metric Value'.

configuration.name: regressionType
configuration.title: Regression Type
configuration.description: Algorithm used to fit trend lines. Default: linear.

configuration.name: samples
configuration.title: Data Samples
configuration.description: One or more named time-window samples (e.g. 'Black Friday', 'Normal Tuesday').

items.name: accountId
items.title: Account ID
items.description: The New Relic account to query for this sample.

items.name: name
items.title: Sample Name
items.description: Display label for this sample (e.g. 'Black Friday').

items.name: color
items.title: Colour
items.description: Optional hex or CSS colour for this sample (e.g. '#E74C3C'). Defaults to automatic palette assignment.

items.name: bucketSize
items.title: Bucket Size (seconds)
items.description: TIMESERIES bucket granularity in seconds for this sample. Default: 60. Automatically increased for large windows to keep query count bounded.

items.name: useTimePicker
items.title: Use Time Picker
items.description: When enabled, the platform time picker drives this sample's window instead of Start/End Time.

items.name: defaultDurationMinutes
items.title: Default Duration (minutes)
items.description: Look-back window in minutes when the time picker is set to 'default'. Only used when 'Use Time Picker' is on. Default: 60.

items.name: startTime
items.title: Start Time
items.description: Window start. Accepts YYYY-MM-DD (midnight) or YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm:ss. Not used when 'Use Time Picker' is on.

items.name: endTime
items.title: End Time
items.description: Window end. Accepts YYYY-MM-DD (midnight) or YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm:ss. Defaults to 24 hours after start time if omitted. Not used when 'Use Time Picker' is on.

items.name: throughputQuery
items.title: Throughput Query
items.description: NRQL returning a single numeric value per bucket (e.g. SELECT count(*) AS value FROM Transaction). Do NOT include TIMESERIES or SINCE/UNTIL — these are added automatically.

items.name: metricsQuery
items.title: Metrics Query
items.description: NRQL returning one or more numeric columns per bucket (e.g. SELECT average(cpuPercent), average(memoryUsedPercent) FROM SystemSample). Do NOT include TIMESERIES or SINCE/UNTIL.
